summary.intent: Review and resolve open comment threads on PR #479 in the moltis repository.
summary.outcome: Two new review threads were addressed by editing the Dockerfile and docs/src/mcp.md, then committing and pushing the changes.

repo: Docker bind-mount paths in the moltis project resolve against the host filesystem — this needed explicit documentation.
The Dockerfile was refactored from a single-RUN layout to a multi-layer structure, requiring comment cleanup to stay accurate.

code.finding: Inline comments described an old single-RUN layer structure; they were updated to match the new multi-layer layout.
Added an explanatory note clarifying that Docker bind-mount paths resolve against the host filesystem.

workflow: PR review threads were fetched via GitHub API (gh), fixed locally in a worktree under /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/twilight-lychee/, then resolved after pushing.
